steps.title: Identify the core demand
steps.content: The question asks for a choice that makes a generalization about symbols on flags and then supports it with evidence.

steps.title: Find the choice that generalizes and supports
steps.content:
D makes a generalization (“The flags of some countries include symbols of animals”) and backs it up with a concrete example from the notes (“Kazakhstan's, for example, includes an eagle.”) The other three fail because A doesn't support its generalization (only defines vexillology), B doesn't generalize (just details one example), and C doesn't address symbols (discusses studying flags instead).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
